title: Title
doc_html:
PART III. MEDICAID BUY-IN PROGRAM

FOR PERSONS WITH DISABILITIES

§1251.1. Title

            This Part may be referred to as the Louisiana Medicaid Buy-In Program for Persons with Disabilities Act.

            Acts 2003, No. 207, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1299.78 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
doc_text:
PART III.  MEDICAID BUY-IN PROGRAM
FOR PERSONS WITH DISABILITIES
§1251.1.  Title
This Part may be referred to as the Louisiana Medicaid Buy-In Program for Persons
with Disabilities Act.
Acts 2003, No. 207, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1299.78 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
